roles.title: Platform Lead
roles.summary: Led development of a reusable delivery platform.

evidence_items.text: Reduced deployment time by 60% through a reusable delivery platform.

source_refs.quote: Reduced deployment time by 60% through a reusable delivery platform.

capabilities.rationale: The evidence explicitly describes a reusable delivery platform.

narrative_themes.rationale: The outcome is expressed as a quantified improvement.

inferences.rationale: The available evidence combines platform ownership with a quantified delivery result.
alternatives: Delivery leader with a single platform achievement

gaps.reason: The CV does not state team size or reporting scope.
gaps.resolution_question: What team and organizational scope did the Platform Lead role include?

reflection.summary: The source supports platform leadership linked to a measurable delivery improvement.
strongly_supported: A reusable platform reduced deployment time by 60%.
unclear: The scale of leadership responsibility is not stated.
suggested_questions: What team and organizational scope did the Platform Lead role include?
